title: Boston Scientific Announces Strategic Investment to Acquire Majority Stake of Acotec Scientific Holdings Limited
text: MARLBOROUGH, Mass. , Dec. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) and Acotec Scientific Holdings Limited ("Acotec" and 6669.HK) announced today that Boston Scientific will make a partial offer to acquire a majority stake, up to a maximum of 65%, of shares of Acotec, a Chinese medical technology company that offers solutions designed for a variety of interventional procedures.

title: Boston Scientific: Price Correction Coming
text: The company is overvalued in many ways. High debt will hamper Boston Scientific's growth.
